'''2-1-135

Alternative term: Regular Reflection

Reflection without diffusion in accordance with the laws of optical reflection, as in a mirror.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig7.jpg|400px|border]]

Reference: C.I.E. (modified) (Fig. 7a)
